div1.entryFree: Sea-monster, a huge and terrible animal living in the sea: Merch. III, 2, 57. ingratitude, more hideous when thou showest thee in a child than the s. Lr. I, 4, 283 (almost generally, though not the less absurdly, supposed to mean the hippopotamus, which lives in rivers.* cf. Lr. IV, 2, 50. Cymb. IV, 2, 35).
